reviews.comment:
Pequeña estación ypf, con buenos baños y un parque alrededor muy bueno. Los surtidores y el lugar denotan una falta de actualización importante pero la razón por la que todos seguimos parando son los sándwiches. Simplemente excelentes, enormes, repletos de un fiambre espectacular y super recomendables. No le pidas más a este lugar, pero si los probas volves a repetir la experiencia cada vez que pases por la zona. Al día de hoy 700 pesos promedio cada uno, pero valen cada centavo... son EXCELENTES DE VERDAD, frescos y los hacen al toque.

(Translated by Google)
A small YPF station with good restrooms and a very nice surrounding park. The pumps and the location show a significant lack of updating, but the reason we all keep stopping here are the sandwiches. Simply excellent, enormous, packed with spectacular cold cuts, and highly recommended. You can't ask for more from this place, but if you try them, you'll repeat the experience every time you pass through the area. As of today, they average 700 pesos each, but they're worth every penny... they're truly excellent, fresh, and made to order.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyZ3REWURnEAE
